titleStmt.title: SII 38.124: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 124. (A.R. No. 124 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅga Choḷa I Year 37: 1107 A.D.

summary.p: This unfinished inscription begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler Pugaḻ-mādu.

It records that Araiyaṉ Rājēndra chōḷaṉ alias Rājasēkhara Mūvēndavēḷāṉ made a gift of a lamp stand and also ninety sheep for burning a lamp perpetually to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu (a subdivision) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. The shepherds of Tribhuvanasundara-chēri at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr received the gift (and undertook the responsibility of measuring out oil for burning the lamp).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu
virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara U
rimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa
villavar kulaitara yenai mannavariḻiya luṟṟiḻi
tarattikkanaittun=tan cakkara naṭātti virasiṁhāsa
nattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya
kovirājakecarivarmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ [śrī]kulottuṅkacoḻa
tevaṟku yāṇṭu muppatteḻāvatu coḻamaṇṭalattu rā
jentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu ṭaiyāṉ A
raiyaṉ Irājendracoḻanāna Irājacekara muventa
veḷāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu rājentracoḻava
ḷanāṭṭup puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūr tiruvoṟṟiyū
ruṭaiyaārkku vaitta tirunan=tā viḷakkonṟu Ivvi
ḷakkoṉṟum Ācandra kālam Erippataṟku vaitta cā
vāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇū
ṟum kaikkoṇṭom tiruvoṟṟiyūril tiripuvanacun=ta
racceri maṉṟāṭikaḷil veṭakutticelvaṉāna tirucciṟṟa
mūrkkoṉum kalvaṉ can=tiraṉāna vaṇṭuvaārāpatikoṉumIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
